runTitle: Vercel production targeted QA - AI full-surface advanced flows on v8.11.13
coveredSurfaces: production version route remains 8.11.13 during advanced AI validation
Reporter Agent first report generation from empty state
Reporter detail section render with anomaly list, recommended actions, and impacted servers
Analyst Agent full-system analysis completes for 15 servers
Analyst per-server drilldown opens prediction and AI insight sections
AI Chat feedback positive submission toggles response evaluation state and prevents duplicate submission
browser console error count 0 and warning count 0 during AI full-surface advanced flow

expertAssessments.rationale: Reporter generation/detail, Analyst full analysis/drilldown, and in-message feedback submission all completed successfully on production v8.11.13.
The previously skipped AI advanced surfaces were exercised end-to-end in one production Playwright session with zero console errors or warnings.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed before AI full-surface QA; effective 9.1391 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected billed usage spike.

artifacts.label: Production AI feedback flow after positive submission

notes: Reporter Agent started from empty state and generated one incident report titled API 서버 CPU 과부하 경고.
Reporter detail rendered anomaly items, recommended actions, pattern summary, and impacted server list without requiring route navigation.
Analyst Agent full analysis completed for the entire 15-server system and rendered issue summary plus per-server cards.
A db-mysql-dc1-primary drilldown was expanded successfully and showed current state, one-hour predictions, and AI insight sections.
AI Chat positive feedback submission changed the response evaluation control state and prevented a second submission in the same message card.
browser_console_messages reported 0 errors and 0 warnings during the production advanced AI flow.
